turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. I want to meet a gastrologist, or, uh, gastroenterologist I think it's called. Having stomach issues for a while.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, gastroenterologist — and we have Dr. Leela Nambiar in that department. She's available on Tuesdays and Thursdays. Do you have a preference?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thursday is better. Any slot in the afternoon?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thursday 2:30 PM is available. Shall I go ahead?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, please. My name is Santosh Biswas and my contact number is 9876543211.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Confirmed, Mr. Biswas! Your appointment with Dr. Leela Nambiar is this Thursday at 2:30 PM. Please avoid heavy meals before the consultation. Confirmation SMS on its way.
